notes: Recognizes continuous DRIVING across the midnight log-day boundary and removes the false request for a new 12:00 AM pre-trip event.
Guards the Pre-trip quick-fix so it cannot insert artificial ON DUTY time into a true midnight driving continuation.
Keeps BOL and Going to linked to the exact Pickup / Loading event, route leg, signing check, and DOT package.
Shows BOL and Going to directly on linked pickup event cards and synchronizes explicit Form route edits back to that exact event without changing its historical time or location.
label: v96.4 Midnight Driving + Route/BOL Link
